summary: The runtime bridge now exposes daemon-owned managed session snapshots and durable observe/take-over/return control transitions. Waiting-for-user and screenshot quarantine are represented in typed runtime state.

assertions.assertion: Managed browser session projects as waiting_for_user for a login gate.
Raw screenshot capture is Runs/Tracing-only and requires sanitized preview before product display.
Operator take-over persists as runtime control state and replays through inspect_thread.

remaining: Live GUI card rendering, GUI take-over/return interaction, waiting-for-user browser fixture, and reload/reconnect proof remain required before ARP-P0-011 can become live_pass.
